heroTitle: Hot Amala & Correct Soup in Lagos
heroSubtitle: Order authentic Naija dishes prepared by top local chefs. Delivered piping hot to your doorstep.
aboutText: From our pot to your plate since 2010, Naija Buka Pro has been the cornerstone of authentic flavors in Lagos. We believe that good food is a right, not a luxury. Our recipes are guarded secrets, passed down through generations of master chefs who understand the soul of Nigerian cuisine.
